body_plan.core_shape: round head fused directly to an oval torso, no visible neck

parts.shape: long flat triangular wedge with a jagged sawtooth edge on the underside

parts.placement: upper face, close together near top of head

parts.shape: long flat tapering blade with a jagged sawtooth trailing edge
parts.placement: one extending left from lower body, one extending right from upper body, staggered at different heights
hanging down from bottom of body, close together

parts.shape: wide fanned webbed shape with radiating pleats, like an open shell or fan
parts.placement: at the end of each leg

distinctive_features: flat wedge beak with jagged sawtooth underside
two long asymmetric jagged-edged wings set at different heights on the body
fan-shaped pleated webbed feet resembling open shells
head fused directly onto body with no neck
small squiggle crest marks atop the head
locomotion: waddles on thick teal legs using fan-webbed feet for paddling or gliding, staggered wings suggest lopsided gliding-hops
vibe: a lopsided fan-footed bird-thing that looks like it's mid-waddle with mismatched jagged wings
